revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初一]][[zh:八月初一]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 1|qq=August 1}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|qid=Q357246|lt=Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|697|en|697|qid=Q23489|lt=697|1=697}} {{ill|August 22|en|August 22|qid=Q2828|lt=August 22|1=August 22}} ) – {{ill|Empress Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} abdicates in favor of her grandson, Prince Karu, who ascends the throne as the 42nd emperor, {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|qid=Q357246|lt=Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}} . * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|qid=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 2 (Julian {{ill|758|en|758|qid=Q30538|lt=758|1=758}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} ) – Prince Ōi, the seventh son of {{ill|Prince Toneri|en|Prince Toneri|qid=Q1362200|lt=Prince Toneri|1=Prince Toneri}} , ascends the throne as the 47th emperor, {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|qid=Q329713|lt=Junnin|1=Emperor Junnin}} . * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 18 (Gregorian {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}} {{ill|August 30|en|August 30|qid=Q2818|lt=August 30|1=August 30}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} enters {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|qid=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle|1=Edo Castle}} . * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2, intercalary 8th month (Gregorian {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|qid=Q2890|lt=September 24|1=September 24}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appoints {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|en|Matsudaira Katamori|qid=Q569441|lt=Matsudaira Katamori|1=Matsudaira Katamori}} , lord of {{ill|Aizu Domain|1=Aizu Domain|2=ja|3=会津藩|ja|Aizu Domain|1=Aizu Domain|2=ja|3=会津藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4389944}} , as the first {{ill|Kyoto Shugoshoku|en|Kyoto Shugoshoku|qid=Q3130091|lt=Kyoto Shugoshoku|1=Kyoto Shugoshoku}} . == Births == * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (Japan)|1=Bunka}} 7 (Gregorian {{ill|1810|en|1810|qid=Q6922|lt=1810|1=1810}} {{ill|August 30|en|August 30|qid=Q2818|lt=August 30|1=August 30}} ) – {{ill|Hotta Masayoshi|en|Hotta Masayoshi|qid=Q910241|lt=Hotta Masayoshi|1=Hotta Masayoshi}} , {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|qid=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}} of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1818|en|1818|qid=Q6964|lt=1818|1=1818}} {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}} ) – {{ill|Date Munenari|en|Date Munenari|qid=Q862949|lt=Date Munenari|1=Date Munenari}} , {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|qid=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} (+ {{ill|1892|en|1892|qid=Q7839|lt=1892|1=1892}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 3 (Gregorian {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|August 30|en|August 30|qid=Q2818|lt=August 30|1=August 30}} ) – {{ill|Tamura Ginjirō|ja|田村銀之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamura Ginjirō|1=Tamura Ginnosuke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11577030}} , {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新撰組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinsengumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 新選組|1=Shinsengumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q221031}} member (+ {{ill|1924|en|1924|qid=Q2173|lt=1924|1=1924}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} ) – {{ill|Dan Takuma|ja|団琢磨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dan Takuma|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 團琢磨|1=Dan Takuma|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q862159}} , {{ill|businessman|ja|Businessperson|1=Businessperson|2=ja|3=実業家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/businessman|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q43845}} , leader of {{ill|Mitsui zaibatsu|ja|三井財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsui zaibatsu|1=Mitsui Zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10865282}} (+ {{ill|1932|en|1932|qid=Q18743|lt=1932|1=1932}} ). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji (Japan)|1=Genji era}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}} ) – {{ill|Akashi Motojiro|en|Akashi Motojiro|qid=Q171418|lt=Akashi Motojirō|1=Akashi Motojiro}} , {{ill|military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1274|en|1274|qid=Q5527|lt=1274|1=1274}} {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}} ) – {{ill|Prince Munetaka|en|Prince Munetaka|qid=Q708897|lt=Prince Munetaka|1=Prince Munetaka}} , 6th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (* {{ill|1242|en|1242|qid=Q5437|lt=1242|1=1242}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō (Japan)|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1507|en|1507|qid=Q6161|lt=1507|1=1507}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} ) – {{ill|Hosokawa Sumimoto|ja|細川澄之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Sumimoto|1=Hosokawa Sumiyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7140166}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1489|en|1489|qid=Q6665|lt=1489|1=1489}} ). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1559|en|1559|qid=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}} {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}} ) – {{ill|Yūki Masakatsu|en|Yūki Masakatsu|qid=Q8062739|lt=Yūki Masakatsu|1=Yūki Masakatsu}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5384684}} of {{ill|Shimōsa Province|en|Shimōsa Province|qid=Q1053695|lt=Shimōsa Province|1=Shimōsa Province}} (* {{ill|1503|en|1503|qid=Q6141|lt=1503|1=1503}} ). * [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1394|en|1394|qid=Q6398|lt=1394|1=1394}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chōkei|en|Emperor Chōkei|qid=Q464039|lt=Emperor Chōkei|1=Emperor Chōkei}} , 98th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} . * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1600|en|1600|qid=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}} ) – {{ill|Torii Mototada|en|Torii Mototada|qid=Q665518|lt=Torii Mototada|1=Torii Mototada}} , retainer of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (* {{ill|1539|en|1539|qid=Q6479|lt=1539|1=1539}} ). == Difficult-to-Read Surnames == There exist Japanese surnames written as "八月朔日" (Hozumi, Hozumi, Hōzumi, or Hozomi), "八月一日" (Hozumi), and "八朔日" (Hozumi). The early-ripening rice harvested around this time of year was the first rice harvest ({{ill|Hatsuho|ja|初穂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatsuho|1=First rice|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396544}} ). There was a long-standing custom among farmers to present the first ears of rice to benefactors, from which the surname originated. See {{ill|Hassaku|ja|八朔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassaku|qq=}} for more details on this custom. == Commemorations == * {{ill|Hassaku|ja|八朔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassaku|qq=}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|30|8|2|7|1|9|8|0801|qq=}}

[[ja:8月30日]]
[[ar:August 1 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月初一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月初一]]
